description_long: This hat is an ornate, dark metallic headpiece with a dramatic, spiked design and intricate detailing. The central section features a large, oval gem-like embellishment surrounded by radiating, shell-like patterns and flanked by three prominent, upward-curving spikes on each side. Dangling chains with oval pendants and beaded elements hang from both sides and the center, adding a sense of movement and luxury. The surface is highly polished, giving it a glossy, almost obsidian-like appearance. The overall silhouette is angular and regal, reminiscent of fantasy or ceremonial crowns. Its structure suggests it is both decorative and symbolic, likely intended for special occasions or theatrical use.
description: A dramatic, spiked dark metallic crown with ornate detailing, dangling chains, and a glossy finish. Features a central gem-like embellishment and elaborate side decorations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the symmetrical spiked design, central gem, and all dangling chains and pendants clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth of the spikes, the layered structure, and the profile of the beaded chains.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, curved back and the attachment points of the side decorations, with less detail visible on the front embellishments.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the profile of the spikes and the hanging chains from a different angle.
attribute_crown_shape: tall, spiked, and contoured with a central raised crest
